description: Default governed scaffold with the baseline planning artifacts and no project-type-specific guidance.

pm.title: Product Manager
pm.mandate: Protect user value, scope clarity, and acceptance criteria.

dev.title: Developer
dev.mandate: Write source code that implements approved work, then verify it passes tests.

qa.title: QA
qa.mandate: Challenge correctness, acceptance coverage, and ship readiness.

eng_director.title: Engineering Director
eng_director.mandate: Resolve tactical deadlocks and enforce technical coherence.
